title: cyperella campestris var. multiflora
intro: Cyperella campestris var. multiflora is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Cyperella campestris var. multiflora is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used as a tea or added to salves and ointments.
